About the Show

More Than a Podcast.
A Movement.

The Faces Podcast aims to inspire and educate entrepreneurs by sharing real stories of challenges, successes, and lessons learned from industry leaders.

Through insightful conversations, it highlights the human side of entrepreneurship, offering valuable business insights, legal strategies, and practical advice.

By fostering a supportive community, the podcast encourages innovation, problem-solving, and meaningful connections among entrepreneurs and business professionals.

SpotifyYouTube
"

The stories you've never heard from the founders you need to know.

The Faces Podcast
◈

Real Stories

Unfiltered conversations with founders who have lived it — the wins, losses, and everything in between.

◇

Practical Wisdom

Business insights, legal strategies, and operational advice you can apply today.

◉

Human Connection

Fostering community among entrepreneurs and business professionals worldwide.

Your Host
01 / 05

Cody Hall

Host & Entrepreneur

Cody Hall is an entrepreneur with a track record of building, scaling, and exiting successful businesses. From launching startups to advising high-growth companies, he has developed deep expertise in operations, team-building, and business strategy.

As the leader of a multinational BPO, Cody helps businesses worldwide streamline operations with remote staffing and call center solutions. He also consults on marketing, sales, and organizational management.

Beyond business, Cody is a dedicated family man. He resides in Las Vegas and Mexico with his wife and three children. Through The Faces: Entrepreneurs Are People Too, he shares insights from founders and business leaders, exploring the personal and professional realities of entrepreneurship.
